caption: A person's hands hold a small, rectangular black foam piece over a clear plastic card holder in a brightly lit indoor setting. In the background, a man wearing a navy blue t-shirt is visible in a smaller picture-in-picture window, sitting at a desk. The scene features a table covered with a colorful palm tree patterned cloth, with stacks of cards and other equipment nearby. The logo "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" are prominently displayed in red and white text on the screen. As the sequence progresses, the person's fingers adjust the black foam, sliding it into the clear plastic holder to secure a card inside. The foam's textured, sparkling surface remains centered in the shot as it is carefully positioned, while the man in the background remains seated and observes the process.
